close_reason: Created jsdeps-gen tool in cmd/jsdeps-gen/ that parses pnpm-lock.yaml
description:
Create TypeScript dependency generator (like godeps-gen, pydeps-gen):

Input: package-lock.json or pnpm-lock.yaml
Output: typescript-deps.toml with:
- Package name, version
- NPM tarball URL
- SRI hash for reproducible fetching

Tool should:
- Parse npm/pnpm lockfile format
- Prefetch packages to compute hashes
- Generate TOML compatible with deps cell builder

Location: cmd/tsdeps-gen/ (Rust, like other *deps-gen tools)
title: Create tsdeps-gen tool
